+DropdownButton<LogLevel?>(
+  value: _levelFilter,
+  hint: const Text('Nível: todos'),
+  onChanged: (v) => setState(() => _levelFilter = v),
+  items: [
+    const DropdownMenuItem<LogLevel?>(
+      value: null,
+      child: Text('Todos'),

+    ...LogLevel.values.map(
